hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; in=$(cat); c=$(printf '%s' "$in" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$c" ] || exit 0; cn=$(printf '%s' "$c" | tr -d '\042\047\134'); printf '%s' "$cn" | grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:];&|(])git[[:space:]]+([^;&|]*[[:space:]])?push([[:space:]]|$)' || exit 0; printf '%s' "$cn" | grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:]])(--force[^[:space:]]*|--delete|--mirror|--prune|-[a-zA-Z0-9]*[fd][a-zA-Z0-9]*)([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])[+:][^[:space:]]+' || exit 0; printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"git push with a force/destructive signature (--force*, --delete, --mirror, --prune, -f/-d incl. combined short flags, +refspec or :refspec deletion, quoted variants) - Fast-path exception, needs explicit user confirmation"}}'
